# Project Beta

Data analytics platform development.

## Status

Active - Q2 2024 release target

## Overview

Project Beta focuses on building a new analytics platform. It will provide real-time dashboards and reporting capabilities.

## Team

- **Tech Lead**: Henry Kim
- **Backend**: Bob Martinez
- **PM**: Eve Thompson

## Objectives

1. Build data ingestion pipeline
2. Create real-time dashboards
3. Implement reporting engine
4. Enable self-service analytics

## Technical Stack

- Data: Python, Spark, Airflow
- Storage: Snowflake
- Visualization: Custom React dashboards

## Dependencies

- Event-Driven Architecture for data streaming
- Project Alpha API for data sources
